ingredients_text: caramel flavour ice cream (50%) [partially reconstituted skimmed milk concentrate, coconut oil, sugar, glucose syrup, dextrose, whey powder (milk), emulsifier: mono-and diglycerides of fatty acids, flavouring, stabilisers: locust bean gum, guar gum, caramelised sugar syrup], milk chocolate (37%) [sugar, cocoa butter, cocoa mass, butter oil (milk), skimmed milk powder, whey powder (milk), emulsifiers: lecithins (soya), polyglycerol polyricinoleate], toffee sauce (7%) [sugar, salted butter (butter (milk), salt), glucose syrup, water, skimmed milk concentrate, invert sugar syrup, skimmed milk powder, dark muscovado sugar, cornflour, emulsifier: mono - and diglycerides of fatty acids, caramelised sugar syrup, gelling agent: pectins], salted biscuit crumble (5%) [wheat flour (wheat flour, calcium carbonate, iron, niacin, thiamin), vegetable oils (shea kernel oil, palm oil, rapeseed oil), sugar, plain chocolate (sugar, cocoa mass, cocoa butter, emulsifier: lecithins (soya)), invert sugar syrup, salt (3,5%), raising agent: sodium carbonates, emulsifier: lecithins (sunflower)]
product_name: Cornish Sea Salted Caramel Chocsticks Ice Cream
